word: H167 - אָהַל - ʼâhal - aw-hal' - Pitch a tent

sections.paragraph:
Original: אהל

Transliteration: 'âhal

Phonetic: aw-hal'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pitch a tent, to move a tent
    1. (Qal) pitch or remove a tent
    2. (Piel) to pitch one's tent

Origin: a denominative from H168

TWOT entry: 32

Part(s) of speech: Verb
